center.name: 西姆拉
center.summary: 西姆拉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括黄嘴蓝鹊，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: From Simla eastwards, the closely related red-billed blue magpie (Urocissa erythroryncha) is often found in the same areas as the yellow-billed species; it is particularly common about Mussoorie, Tehri-Garhwal, -Kumaon, and in Nepal, and may be easily distinguished by its red beak and the greater extent of the white nape-patch

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: From Simla eastwards, the closely related red-billed blue magpie (Urocissa erythroryncha) is often found in the same areas as the yellow-billed species; it is particularly common about Mussoorie, Tehri-Garhwal, -Kumaon, and in Nepal, and may be easily distinguished by its red beak and the greater extent of the white nape-patch
